title: Gym
description: A climbing gym and how it grades. Created once, referenced by every session there. The grading definition is what future analysis uses to normalize grades across gyms (soft vs sandbagged).

id.description: Unique id, matches the filename stem: <slug>--<shortid>.

grading.description: v_scale: V0..V17. kyu_dan: Japanese 級/段, stored compact (5q, 1d). circuit: gym-defined levels, each mapping to an approx V range. The canonical normalized scale sits exactly between TB2 and Kilter grading — see codebook.md.

circuits.description: Required when grading=circuit. Ordered easiest to hardest.
